⚙️
SETTINGS
HOW TO USE ZORBLAX

🌌 HOW ZORBLAX WORKS

Zorblax is a complete intergalactic language app with – tabs, – words, travel between planets and full identity documents.

NAVIGATION
Swipe the top tab bar left or right to see all tabs. Tap any tab to switch pages.

YOUR DATA
All your passports, ID cards and progress are saved permanently on this device in local storage. Updating the app never deletes your data.

📋 TAB GUIDE

🛸
HOME
Quick phrases and app overview
📚
DICTIONARY
– words across – categories. Search any word.
🔄
TRANSLATOR
English ↔ Zorblax. Tap 🔊 to hear pronunciation.
👾
ALIENS
Biographies of all alien species including Humans.
🪪
IDENTITY
Create your Zorblax Passport and ID Card.
✨
NAME GENERATOR
Get your Zorblax name. Auto-fills documents.
🧠
QUIZ & LESSONS
100 lessons and 1,500 quiz questions to learn Zorblax.
🌍
NATIONALITY
Apply for citizenship on other planets. Get a 15-digit code then verify to receive your planet passport.
📁
DOCUMENTS
All your passports, ID cards and nationality papers stored here. Old and current versions.
🏆
RANKINGS
Galactic leaderboards — GDP, Military, Population, Tech, Peace and more.
🔍
INVESTIGATE
Search any citizen by their 8-digit ID or 11-digit passport number.
🚀
TRAVEL
Travel to 8 planets. Each planet has its own language, dictionary and translator. Real travel time based on distance.

📤 TRANSFER: WEBSITE → APP

Move your passport and all data from the website to the installed app on your home screen.

1
Open Zorblax on the website (in Chrome or Safari browser)
2
Go to 📁 DOCS tab → tap BACKUP DATA
3
A zorblax-backup.json file downloads to your phone
4
Open the installed app from your home screen
5
Go to 📁 DOCS tab → tap RESTORE DATA → select the json file
✓
App reloads with all your data — passport, ID, everything!

📥 TRANSFER: APP → WEBSITE

Same process in reverse — move data from your app back to the website.

1
Open the installed app from your home screen
2
Go to 📁 DOCS tab → tap BACKUP DATA
3
Open Zorblax on the website in your browser
4
Go to 📁 DOCS tab → tap RESTORE DATA → select backup file
✓
Website now has your app data!

🔒 YOUR DATA & PRIVACY

What is saved: Your passport, ID card, nationality papers, quiz progress, Zorblax name.

Where it is saved: Only on this device. Never sent to any server. Completely private.

How to protect it: Use Backup regularly. Save the json file to WhatsApp Saved Messages or Google Drive.

Data between friends: Each person has their own separate data. Use Investigate tab to look up a friend by their ID number.

⬇️ DOWNLOAD THE APP

Install Zorblax on your home screen so it works offline like a real app.

🤖 ANDROID (Chrome)
1
Open the Zorblax website in Chrome
2
A banner appears at the bottom saying "INSTALL ZORBLAX" — tap INSTALL
3
If no banner: tap the 3 dots menu ⋮ in Chrome → tap "Add to Home screen"
4
Tap Install on the popup — Zorblax icon appears on your home screen
✓
Open the icon — works fully offline!
🍎 iOS — iPhone & iPad (Safari)
1
Open the Zorblax website in Safari (must be Safari, not Chrome)
2
Tap the Share button — the box with an arrow pointing up ↑ at the bottom
3
Scroll down the share menu and tap "Add to Home Screen"
4
Tap Add in the top right — Zorblax icon appears on home screen
✓
Opens fullscreen like a real app — works offline!
👽

ZarbMars / Home

NATIONALITY BUREAU
APPLY FOR ALIEN CITIZENSHIP

ℹ️ HOW IT WORKS

1. Choose a planet and tap APPLY
2. Get your 15-digit approval code
3. Enter the code in the verify box below
4. Receive planet Passport & ID Card

⚠ Zarb (Mars) citizens already have Zorblax citizenship.

🔑 VERIFY YOUR CODE

Enter the 15-digit code from your application.
